languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете на себе взгляд бригадира Паска. В его руках винтовка, но, кажется, он не вполне уверен, стоит ли в вас стрелять. Рабочие по сторонам от бригадира растерянно переглядываются, ожидая его команды.{/n}

{n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете на себе взгляд бригадира Паска. В его руках винтовка, но, кажется, он не вполне уверен, стоит ли в вас стрелять. Рабочие по сторонам от бригадира растерянно переглядываются, ожидая его команды.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

{n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

{n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

languages.text: {n}作業大工長パスクの目があなたに注がれているのを感じます。彼は銃を持っているものの、あなたを撃つべきだと確信していないようです。彼の両側に立つ作業員たちは互いの顔を見合わせ、彼の指示を待っています。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}作業 foreman パスクの目があなたに注がれているのを感じます。彼は銃を持っているものの、あなたを撃つべきだと確信していないようです。彼の両側に立つ作業員たちは互いの顔を見合わせ、彼の指示を待っています。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sientes la marida del capataz Pask. Empuña un rifle, pero no parece convencido de que deba dispararte. Los trabajadores que tiene a ambos lados se miran, confusos, esperando sus órdenes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sientes la marida del capataz Pask. Empuña un rifle, pero no parece convencido de que deba dispararte. Los trabajadores que tiene a ambos lados se miran, confusos, esperando sus órdenes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你察觉到工头帕斯克正盯着你。他手中紧握步枪，但似乎还没下定决心朝你开火。站在他身旁的工人们面面相觑，神情惶惑，等着他下令。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你察觉到工头帕斯克正盯着你。他手中紧握步枪，但似乎还没下定决心朝你开火。站在他身旁的工人们面面相觑，神情惶惑，等着他下令。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du spürst Vorarbeiter Pasks Blick auf dir ruhen. Er hat ein Gewehr in der Hand, ist sich aber offenbar nicht sicher, ob er dich erschießen soll. Die Arbeiter neben ihm sehen sich verwirrt an und warten auf sein Kommando.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du spürst Vorarbeiter Pasks Blick auf dir ruhen. Er hat ein Gewehr in der Hand, ist sich aber offenbar nicht sicher, ob er dich erschießen soll. Die Arbeiter neben ihm sehen sich verwirrt an und warten auf sein Kommando.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ustabaşı Pask'ın gözlerinin üzerinde olduğunu hissediyorsun. Elinde bir tüfek var ama seni vurması gerektiğine tam olarak ikna olmuş görünmüyor. İki yanında duran işçiler, şaşkınlık içinde birbirlerine bakarak ondan emir bekliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ustabaşı Pask'ın gözlerinin üzerinde olduğunu hissediyorsun. Elinde bir tüfek var ama seni vurması gerektiğine tam olarak ikna olmuş görünmüyor. İki yanında duran işçiler, şaşkınlık içinde birbirlerine bakarak ondan emir bekliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous sentez peser sur vous le regard du contremaître Pask. Malgré le fusil entre ses mains, il ne semble pas tout à fait convaincu de devoir vous tirer dessus. De part et d'autre, les ouvriers échangent des regards perplexes en attendant ses ordres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You sense the foreman Pask's eyes on you. He has a rifle in his hands, but he does not seem fully convinced that he should shoot you. The workers standing on either side of him look at each other in confusion, awaiting his command.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous sentez peser sur vous le regard du contremaître Pask. Malgré le fusil entre ses mains, il ne semble pas tout à fait convaincu de devoir vous tirer dessus. De part et d'autre, les ouvriers échangent des regards perplexes en attendant ses ordres.{/n}
